title: Multiple failed SSH attempts from external IP
message: failed ssh login brute force detected from 185.71.67.12
recommendation: Block the source IP, review successful logins, rotate exposed credentials, and enforce MFA.

title: Encoded PowerShell command execution
message: powershell encoded command observed with suspicious execution chain
recommendation: Isolate endpoint, collect process tree, review parent process, and inspect persistence locations.

title: Unusual admin account creation
message: admin account created outside normal change window
recommendation: Disable the account, review creator identity, audit group changes, and validate change ticket.

title: Port scan against internal subnet
message: port scan detected against multiple internal hosts
recommendation: Identify scanning host, isolate if unauthorized, and review lateral movement indicators.

title: SQL injection attempt against web application
message: sql injection attempt detected in HTTP query string
recommendation: Block attacking IP, review WAF logs, validate application input filtering, and inspect database access logs.
